_meta.title: hexa-lang 학습/추론/서빙 돌파 정리
_meta.purpose: hexa-lang에서 발견된 학습/추론/서빙 돌파를 anima 이식용으로 분리 정리
_meta._audit_phantom_sweep_20260420: evolution_chain 'speedup' column is computed as v1_ms(16100)/stage_ms — denominator shrinks with MODEL shrink (ultra11=0.5M, ultra15=0.02M). Not apples-to-apples beyond alphabeta3. ultra15 58122x is a shrink-factor composite, not a same-shape speedup. vs_pytorch 10.8x is single-config 2026-04-10 snapshot, not re-verified. Headline figures should be cited with (shape, date, commit) triple.

training._description: 학습 — T2 100M spec 1B tokens 8h 목표. 2176x 가속 달성, 4x gap 잔존
training.headline: v1 16100ms → alphabeta3+BLIS 7.40ms/step (2176x), 1B tokens 32.1h (8h target 4x over)
training.vs_pytorch: hexa 10.8x faster than PyTorch at same 69M config (15.80 vs 170 ms)

techniques.name: LM head U+V 분리
techniques.pattern: W_lmh[D×VOCAB] → U_lmh[D×r] + V_lmh[r×VOCAB]. forward = 2 small matmul. optimizer only updates V_lmh.

techniques.name: BLAS-only loss/backward
techniques.pattern: loss_mse VOCAB loop → mat_add + matmul dot product (단일 BLAS call). bwd VOCAB loop → mat_scale + mat_add.

techniques.name: @lowrank r=16 sweet spot
techniques.pattern: W(M×N) → U(M×r) @ V(r×N). r=16 K,N 큰 경우 최적.
techniques.anima_target: 14B v0.5 LoRA r=64 → r=16 A/B 검증

techniques.name: Rank-r attention
techniques.anima_target: ConsciousDecoderV2 self-attn 384d r=16 = 24x. CA/META-CA 신호 보존 검증 필요

techniques.name: Block-Diagonal Attention (batch>1)
techniques.pattern: 단순 M축 확장 시 O(B²) 악화 → 샘플별 분리 루프로 attention scores 유지
techniques.anima_target: 현재 batch=2-4 학습. multi-GPU DDP는 자동 분리.

techniques.name: Fused kernel (qkv/ffn/block_forward_chain)
techniques.pattern: layer 단위 matmul 시퀀스를 단일 C/Rust 함수 내부로 묶어 dispatch overhead 제거 + scratch alloc 1회
techniques.anima_target: torch.compile / FusedAttention 사용. PyTorch는 자동 fused 생성 안 함.

techniques.name: sgemm f32 + thread=1
techniques.pattern: BLIS dgemm 33 GFLOPS / sgemm 88 GFLOPS. 단일코어 thread=1이 contention 회피.

list: mat_add_inplace — Arc::get_mut unique path, fallback copy
axpy(W, G, α) — cblas_daxpy W += αG
ffn_fused_into — 4 cblas chained inside single call
block_forward_fused — 전체 Transformer block in single builtin
block_forward_chain — N layer loop in Rust + single scratch alloc
read_file_bytes / file_size — 바이너리 I/O (GGUF loader 지원)

inference._description: 추론 — T1 7B int4 batch=1 128 tok/s 목표. FAIL (56x gap)
inference.headline: T1 7B 추론: v6_chain + BLIS 440ms/forward = 2.27 tok/s (target 128 → 56x gap)
inference.root_cause: hexa 인터프리터 Tensor ABI + htz BLAS sustained 25 GFLOPS ceiling. 7B 물리한계 bandwidth 24 tok/s (83 GB/s ÷ 3.5GB). 천장 도달에는 cold hardware 또는 JIT Tensor helper 필요.
inference.blocker_for_anima: hexa interp Tensor Arc allocation per-call overhead 지배. anima는 PyTorch 기반이므로 무관.
anima_lessons: 추론용 fused block kernel 패턴 (qkv_fused → ffn_fused → block_chain)
sustained BLAS ceiling 측정법 (load 20-60 contention 천장)

serving._description: 서빙 — Linux BLAS 링크 + sustained throughput 천장 측정
serving.headline: Linux BLIS 링크 성공 → scalar fallback 3-4x 개선, sustained 25 GFLOPS ceiling

linux_blas_linking.pre_state: hexa Linux에서 cblas_dgemm 미호출 (macOS 전용 cfg)

MKL_attempt_failed.issue: libmkl_rt 링크 시도 → Ubuntu apt intel-mkl 2020.4 symbol error

hardware_ceiling.verdict: hexa matmul throughput = sustained ceiling. engine limit 아님, hardware contention 천장.

ssh_stability.rule: HX_SSH_001 — hetzner SSH 장시간 명령 시 ServerAliveInterval=60 필수
ssh_stability.evidence: blowup math 3 실행 중 Connection reset by peer
ssh_stability.enforcement: blowup_router.hexa ssh 호출 시 -o ServerAliveInterval=60 -o ServerAliveCountMax=3

anima_serving_implications: Hetzner CPU 서빙은 sustained 25 GFLOPS 천장 — 7B 모델 cold start 외 한계
Vast.ai/H100 GPU 서빙이 7B+ 추론 유일 경로
BLIS 링크는 hexa-lang 전용, anima(PyTorch)는 자동 MKL/OpenBLAS 사용
SSH 장기 작업 시 ServerAlive 옵션 필수 (anima 학습 모니터링에도 적용)

anima_porting_priority._description: anima 이식 우선순위 — PyTorch 기반이므로 학습 기법은 직접 이식 가능
